parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "pipeline": "retention",
  "customer_id": "{{ $json.customer_id }}",
  "action": "{{ $json.action }}",
  "churn_score": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.churn_score }},
  "churn_risk_level": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.churn_risk_level }}",
  "final_route": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.final_route }}",
  "orchestrator_override": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.orchestrator_override }},
  "logged_at": "{{ $now }}"
}
